calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Van Dam for Mary Cox.

The Court raised the issue of conflict with Mr. Van Dam representing Ms. O'Connor and also representing Ms. Cox the Party who wants to remove Ms. O'Connor. The Court also questioned why Ms. O'Connor couldn't resign. Mr. Van Dam presented oral argument to support his position. The Petition for Letters of Administration and the Petition for Revocation of Letters of Administration were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)

Petition For Revocation Of Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Mr. Van Dam contacted the Court yesterday indicating that he had a conflict this morning and requested a one day continuance. The Petition for Letters of Administration, the Order to Appear and the Petition for Revocation of Letters of Administration were continued to June 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
